title: Day 14 Quiz — Week 2 Cumulative Review
description: Cumulative verification of APIs, hooks, Context, routing, performance, and event loop across Week 2.

questions.prompt: During Machine Coding Round 2, you may use ChatGPT if you only ask syntax questions.
questions.explanation: Roadmap rules: no AI during the timed build. Official documentation only.

questions.prompt: First priority when running low on time in a machine coding round?

options.text: End-to-end core flow: list → add to cart → see cart total
Write unit tests for every component

questions.explanation: Interviewers evaluate working core features under time pressure. Polish is secondary.

questions.prompt: Which Week 2 pattern shares cart state across product and cart pages?
questions.explanation: Day 12 pattern — CartProvider + reducer dispatches from any route.

questions.prompt: Which belong in the Round 2 product filter pipeline? Select all that apply.

options.text: useEffect with no deps for filter

questions.explanation: Search, category, price, and sort compose the listing pipeline. useEffect with no deps causes loops — use useMemo for derivation.

questions.prompt: Debounce uses {{blank1}} scheduled as a macrotask. fetch().then() runs as a {{blank2}}.
questions.explanation: Event loop ordering — microtasks drain before next macrotask.
Sync 1, 2 → microtask 3 → macrotask 4. Core Day 11 event loop knowledge.

questions.prompt: Cart reducer ADD_ITEM finds existing product. Correct update?

options.text: return { items: state.items.map(i => i.id === id ? { ...i, quantity: i.quantity + 1 } : i) }

questions.explanation: Immutable map with spread — increment quantity without mutation.

questions.prompt: Name two official doc sites allowed during Machine Coding Round 2.
questions.sampleAnswer: react.dev for React hooks and patterns; developer.mozilla.org for fetch, arrays, and event loop; reactrouter.com for routing; typescriptlang.org for types.
questions.explanation: Know the rules before starting the timer.

questions.prompt: Complete the custom hook name following React rules.
questions.explanation: Custom hooks must start with use — Day 09 pattern.

questions.prompt: Why use product.id as list key in the Round 2 product grid?

options.text: Stable identity across filter/sort reorder — Day 10

questions.explanation: Stable keys prevent reconciliation bugs when filters change list order.
